shared_attributes.position: center of 128x128 screen, on perch at y=60
shared_attributes.key_features: crest, cheek patch, tail - 3 essential cockatiel traits

context.game: Pico Echo - virtual pet cockatiel game
context.role: Default state of Echo when no interaction is happening
context.screen_position: Center of screen (x=64, y=60), standing on perch
context.usage_scenario: Plays continuously when Echo is not eating, sleeping, or performing other actions. Most frequently seen state.

visual_specification.shape: Cockatiel bird facing forward, standing upright on perch
visual_specification.texture: Flat pixel art with hand-drawn organic edges, no gradients

animation.description: Frame 1: Eyes open. Frame 2: Eyes open with subtle body shift. Frame 3: Eyes closed (blink). Frame 4: Eyes open. Crest in normal position (not raised).

visual_specification.details: Crest: 4-5 feather spikes pointing upward, #FFEC27. Cheek patch: circular #FF004D on each side of head. Tail: 3-4 long feathers extending downward. Feet: 2 simple lines gripping perch. Eyes: 2x2px, positioned symmetrically.

relationships.shared_with: All Echo states share same base body structure, color palette, and size
relationships.differences_from: echo_happy: crest raised vs normal. echo_sleeping: head tucked vs upright. echo_eating: head down vs neutral.

explicit_negations: Crest not raised (reserved for happy state)
Eyes not half-closed (only open or fully closed for blink)
